HGSS.589.0000:
Do you listen to the radio?\f
Which shows do you prefer?\f
I like Buena’s Password!\f
When I catch it, I take notes so
I don’t forget the password.\f
That’s why my Pokégear is full
of scribbles!
HGSS.589.0001:
Even Team Rocket would understand
how refreshing it is to listen to the\r
Radio on the rooftop, right?
HGSS.589.0002:
If you’re tired, try the Vending
Machine’s drinks.\r
Your Pokémon will love them, too.
HGSS.589.0003:
Team Rocket...\f
You should have a drink from the
vending machine and take a break.\f
It’s about time you started thinking
of how you want to live your life.
HGSS.589.0004:
Take a Break from Shopping!
6F Rooftop Atrium
HGSS.589.0005:
It’s a vending machine.
Which drink would you like? [0200,0000]
HGSS.589.0006:
Clang!\f
A can of [0108,0000,0000] dropped down.\f
HGSS.589.0007:
Clang!\f
Bonus! Another can of [0108,0000,0000]
dropped down.\f
HGSS.589.0009: Decided not to buy a drink.
HGSS.589.0010:
The must-try of the Goldenrod
Department Store!\r
Welcome to the Daily Drawing Corner!\f
You can try it for $300, and we have
wonderful prizes!\f
Would you like to try it? [0200,0000]
HGSS.589.0012:
Wow!
You’ve got yourself the no. [0132,0000,0000] prize!\f
Please take it.\f
HGSS.589.0015:
Oh my...
Your Bag is full.\f
Then we’ll refund you the money.\f
HGSS.589.0016:
Oh my...
You’re short of money.\f
Please come again.
HGSS.589.0018:
Sunday’s prizes will be:\f
No. 1, TM02!
No. 2, Luxury Ball!\r
Or No. 3, a Berry!

No. 2, Nest Ball!\r

HGSS.589.0025:
Whitney: What a coincidence!
This must be meant to be.\f
Do you want to exchange
phone numbers? Please? [0200,0000]
HGSS.589.0027:
Whitney: I’m available around noon
on Saturdays.\f
Give me a call when you’ve got time.
HGSS.589.0029:
Whitney: Do you want to know
my phone number now? [0200,0000]
HGSS.589.0030:
Whitney: Why don’t we take a
picture together? [0200,0000]
HGSS.589.0031:
Whitney: OK!
Stand right next to me, right here!\f
HGSS.589.0032: Whitney: Don’t we look good together?
HGSS.589.0034:
Your Photo Album is full.\f

some pictures.
